nodes.name: Send Discord Message
nodes.notes: Sends response to Discord channel. Uses predefined discordBotApi credential for Authorization: Bot <token> header. Body is pre-serialized JSON from Build Discord Body node.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Sends response to Telegram chat. parse_mode=HTML (from Platform Formatter). disable_web_page_preview avoids unfurling URLs in AI responses.

parameters.query:
UPDATE n8n_chat_histories
SET message = jsonb_set(message, '{content}', to_jsonb($1::text))
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM n8n_chat_histories
  WHERE session_id = $2
    AND (message->>'type') = 'ai'
  ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
)

nodes.name: Send Trace
nodes.notes: Sends debug trace to #aerys-debug. continueOnFail=true so trace failure never blocks user response. retryOnFail for DNS transient failures on Tachyon.
